skills.name: requirements-workshop
skills.purpose: Turn feature-level work into traceable requirements before implementation starts.
trigger_conditions: Applicability is Required for feature-level work.
procedure: Gather the minimum required roles, including one dissenting perspective.
Write the workshop artifact using the canonical headings.
Trace requirements back to stakeholder concerns.
validation: Requirements include source role and validation criteria
skills.revision_policy: Revise when workshop steps, role expectations, or traceability rules change.

skills.name: delegation-planning
skills.purpose: Decide whether work should stay single-agent or split across bounded roles.
trigger_conditions: A task may be delegated or parallelized.
procedure: Identify blocking work and sidecar work.
Confirm whether writable scopes are bounded and non-overlapping.
Prefer read-only parallelism before writable parallelism.
Record the decision in a handoff when ownership changes.
validation: Writable ownership overlap is checked before delegation
Parallel writers do not exceed configured limits
skills.revision_policy: Revise when ownership validation rules or handoff requirements change.

skills.name: adapter-regeneration
skills.purpose: Regenerate vendor-specific adapters after canonical source changes.
trigger_conditions: Canonical agentic docs or registries change.
Adapter drift is reported by validation.
procedure: Review generated outputs for expected target paths and provenance banners.
Run governance validation to confirm no drift remains.
skills.revision_policy: Revise when adapter formats or supported targets change.

skills.name: retrospective-capture
skills.purpose: Convert repeated workflow pain into explicit guidance, skills, validations, or role changes.
trigger_conditions: Review comments or handoff failures repeat.
procedure: Summarize the trigger and reviewed evidence.
List pain points and root causes.
Prefer guidance, skill, or validation changes before proposing a new role.
validation: Recommended changes map to explicit artifacts
skills.revision_policy: Revise when retrospective triggers or action categories change.
